name: Chow-Down Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Frozen Broccoli, cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 116 Cal., 8g Pro., 17g Carbo., 3g fat, 2mg chol., 477 Sodium
1. In a small saucepan, bring broth and broccoli to boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Do not drain. Set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, cook mushrooms and onions in margarine until tender.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Add milk all at once.
5. Cook and stir until bubbly. Cook and stir an additional minute.
6. Stir in broccoli with broth, corn, and pimiento; heat through.
